publishedAbstract: After installing Red Hat OpenShift Data Foundation (ODF) 4.20 in a disconnected environment, the ODF Operator fails to become ready. ``` "failed getting odf-deps csv" csvName="odf-dependencies-operator.vX.X.X" clusterserviceversions.operators.coreos.com "odf-dependencies-operator.vX.X.X" not found ```
publishedTitle: ClusterServiceVersion (CSV) Not Found during ODF Operator Installation in Disconnected Environments
